headline: Is Franklin Resources Stock Outperforming the Nasdaq?
summary: While Franklin Resources has outperformed the Nasdaq recently, analysts remain cautious about the stock’s prospects.

headline: Jenny Johnson, third-generation Franklin Templeton CEO, on managing trillions for the family business
summary: Franklin Templeton CEO Jenny Johnson leads a global fund manager with nearly $2 billion in assets and a 79-year-old family business started by her grandfather.

headline: Best Dividend Aristocrats As Of March 20, 2026
summary: Dividend Aristocrats (NOBL) beat SPY YTD; March pullback offers entry. Recent dividend increases were from CL, GD, LIN, and O. See more here.
